name: get_entry
description: Retrieve a single content entry by its numeric ID from a specific content type. Returns the entry's full attributes, including any populated relations and components. Use the populate parameter to control which related data is included. Useful for fetching a specific article, product, or any content item when you already know its ID.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: The pluralized API name of the content type (e.g., 'articles', 'products').

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the entry to retrieve.

parameters.name: populate
parameters.description: Relations and components to populate. Use '*' for all first-level relations, or specify individually: 'populate[0]=author&populate[1]=tags'.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Select specific fields to return. Format: 'fields[0]=title&fields[1]=content'.

attributes.title: Introduction to AI Agents
attributes.content: A comprehensive guide to building AI agents that can discover and interact with services at runtime...
